editing_rules: Use this file as the canonical implementation checklist for the initiative.
Work one feature at a time and only flip passes to true after evidence-backed verification.
Keep the plan, session state, and progress log synchronized with real repository state.

features.description: Scaffold the canonical docs tree and rehome existing tracked docs into the required taxonomy.
steps: Create docs/design-docs, docs/references, docs/product-specs, docs/generated, and docs/exec-plans.
Move tracked docs with git mv to preserve history.
Add index files that route agents to the right canonical documents.

features.description: Introduce the markdown-plan-plus-JSON-state exec-plan workflow with validation tooling.
steps: Add docs/PLANS.md, docs/exec-plans/PLAN_TEMPLATE.md, index files, and the active/completed layout.
Record this migration in a completed plan with JSON state.

features.description: Generate the typed schema reference and prove the migration with grep, link, lint, type, and test checks.
steps: Generate docs/generated/db-schema.md from the current typed schema source.
Update README and CI to point at the canonical docs and checks.
Run exec-plan, link, lint, type, and test verification.
